title: Wondrous Journey
author: Ilie Cioara
description: The Wondrous Journey is Ilie Cioara's follow up to The Silence of the Mind. It is a practical book on meditation and enlightenment, a must read for any spiritual seeker. A less rational and more poetic Eckhart Tolle; Kahlil Gibran meets Krishnamurti. His message is original and unique, as Ilie Cioar
